svg.style: transition: none !important; animation-duration: 0s !important; animation-delay: -0.0001s; animation-play-state: paused; animation-trigger: none; display: flex; fill: none; height: 16px; transition-property: none; visibility: visible

path.style: transition: none !important; animation-duration: 0s !important; animation-delay: -0.0001s; animation-play-state: paused; animation-trigger: none; fill: rgb(22, 22, 22); transform-origin: 0px 0px; transition-property: none; visibility: visible
